summaries.summary: Active week across OrderProtection monolog and cart-widget (TypeScript) plus eyegaze (Go). Shipped warranty exclusion support, customizable info modals, and claim automation optimizations. Merged 14 PRs with focus on code quality and feature refinement.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented warranty product exclusion pipeline and customizer support for info modals
monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed claim settings, agent decision tracking, and optimized order fetches in claim automation
monolog (OrderProtection): Resolved merge conflicts, removed any types, and addressed PR feedback with enums and Tailwind
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Shipped automatic pickup detection and customizable info modal content features
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Fixed debug logger integration with async widget config and code review findings
eyegaze: Initial macOS eye-tracking cursor control implementation with improved calibration density and stability

pidoshva.github.io: Added 20 commits including new blog post, journal workflow updates, and automated weekly summary logic refinements
